name: STRUCTURED PRODUCTS CORP CORTS TR FOR PECO ENERGY CAP TR III
summary: Structured Products Corp CORTS Trust for PECO Energy Capital Trust III is a statutory trust that holds certificates representing investors' interests. The Trust's certificates are listed on the New York Stock Exchange under ticker KTH and are registered in the name of Cede & Co., the nominee of The Depository Trust Company. The Trust makes periodic distributions to certificate holders.
